title: Deviation Between Yosys RTLIL EBNF Docs and RTLIL Lex/Yacc Frontend
reason: This issue is about RTLIL grammar documentation discrepancies (EBNF grammar vs. Lex/Yacc parser implementation), not SystemVerilog code. The bug involves RTLIL text format parsing order (switch/assign statements in process body, missing conn_stmt in module-body). RTLIL is Yosys's internal intermediate representation, not SystemVerilog.
